title: Set up Auth.js v5 in a Next.js App Router project
summary: Complete Auth.js v5 setup — install, route handler, middleware, providers (Google/GitHub/Credentials), session access in server & client components, and database adapter.
declaration: I will set up Auth.js v5 (the successor to NextAuth.js v4) for authentication. Auth.js v5 is designed for the App Router and supports Edge Runtime. If you prefer Clerk, Lucia, or another auth solution, say so before I begin.
